name: CNC Router Machine
description: Precision routing and shaping for decorative panels, carved details, and custom wood components.

name: Edge Banding Machine
description: Applies clean, durable edges to panels for cabinets, wardrobes, and visible architectural joinery.

name: Panel Saw Machine
description: Supports accurate panel sizing for repeatable production, cleaner cuts, and material efficiency.

name: Automatic Drilling Machine
description: Creates consistent cabinet system holes for hinges, shelves, rails, and hardware fittings.

name: Sanding Machine
description: Prepares refined surfaces for veneer, laminate, paint, and premium finishing workflows.

name: Paint & Finishing Equipment
description: Supports polished finishing standards for durable, elegant architectural woodwork.
